# netbox-v1alpha1_apply_topology (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `spec` (Attributes) ApplyTopologySpec defines the desired state of ApplyTopology (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Optional

- `alarms` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alarms))
- `api_version` (String)
- `deviations` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deviations))
- `kind` (String)
- `name` (String) name of the ApplyTopology
- `namespace` (String) the namespace scope in which to operate
- `status` (Attributes) ApplyTopologyStatus defines the observed state of ApplyTopology (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)

Optional:

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)


<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Required:

- `instance_name` (String) Netbox instance reference

Optional:

- `device_tags` (List of List of String) Tags to filter Devices to sync.
It not set all Devices in the Site are synced.
kubebuilder:validation:Optional
- `dry_run` (Boolean) Maps to the Dry Run field in the Checks struct of the NetworkTopology CR.
- `site_name` (String) Site name to sync Devices and Cables from.
It not set the Namespace name is used.


<a id="nestedatt--alarms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alarms`

Optional:

- `critical` (Number)
- `major` (Number)
- `minor` (Number)
- `warning` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--deviations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deviations`

Optional:

- `count` (Number)
